topic: Refero MCP developer surface for an mcp-tooling transport mode (refero.design/mcp + refero_skill repo): tool surface, auth, rate limits, mcp-remote transport, free vs paid gating, transport-packet authoring

focus: Broad survey: Refero MCP tool surface (8 tools), auth model, coverage limits, skill-repo conventions vs mcp-figma transport
noveltyJustification: First pass; no prior research in this lineage — tool inventory, auth model, coverage limits, and skill-vs-transport distinction are all net-new.

ruledOut.reason: SPA returns only a title via WebFetch; no crawlable body

noveltyJustification: Substantially new angles — gating/rate-limit gap confirmed as negative knowledge, first-use browser-sign-in constraint, full packet layout + Code Mode calling convention — none present in iteration 1; some consolidation of iteration-1 tool-surface facts.
